title: Ruined Ghasts
description: Knarfy Ruined Minecraft Live (Spring 2025) and this is the result...
body:
# Knarfy's Ruined Ghasts
Welcome to the first release of the Ruined Ghast mod — a cursed expansion of the Ghast family featuring new mob variants, items, tools, mechanics, and one very dry dimension created by Knarfy for a video.

Check out the original video here:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/EVOC8jC6JQY" title="YouTube video playerr" frameborder="80" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Here's everything you'll encounter in this mod in one nice consice list:
- Dried Ghast  
- Cooked Ghast  
- Burnt Ghast  
- Ghastling  
- Eepy Ghast  
- Long Ghast  
- Flabber Ghast  
- Cool Ghast  
- Saxophone Ghast  
- TNT Ghast  
- Subscribe Ghast  
- Wet Ghast  
- Saxophone item  
- Copper Needle item  
- Deflated Ghast  
- Bucket of Ghast  
- Dehydrator item  
- Dehydrated Cow  
- Dehydrated Sheep  
- Dehydrated Pig  
- Dehydrated Chicken  
- Dehydrated Fish  
- Dehydrated Cat  
- Dehydrated Bee  
- Dehydrated Squid  
- Dehydrated Villager  
- Dehydrated Sniffer  
- Dehydrated Player  
- Dehydrated Dimension  

Good luck!
